productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Broad Striped Polo Red T-shirt
description: Composition Red polo T-shirt with navy blue stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a navy blue spread collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, vented hem, embroidered branding on the right chest, appliquéd and embroidered branding on the left chest Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Designed for the man of regal style, this striped polo T-shirt from wrangler is made of pure cotton to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. The short ribbed sleeves compliment your well-toned arms, while the vented hem provides a comfortable fit. Team this tee with denims and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height:6' and shoulders:18”
